name: Freezer Mix Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. Place the frozen mix and remaining ingredients except noodles in a 2-quart saucepan.
3. Heat to boiling.
4. Reduce heat and cover, stirring frequently until the mix is thawed and celery is tender, about 40 minutes.
5. While the meat mixture is simmering, cook noodles as directed on the package; drain.
6. Stir noodles into the meat mixture and continue simmering until hot.
